name: xdm_smart_bandwidth_queue_automation_overlay
description: Adds live bandwidth profiles, metered and battery policies, dynamic global/queue/per-host concurrency, prerequisite-aware queues, and schedule-specific transfer profiles.
commitMessage: Add smart bandwidth profiles and queue automation
constraints: Apply on top of commit fc33a2b
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve existing download, browser, media, scheduler, diagnostics, aria2, resume-integrity, recovery, and secure-update behavior
Treat per-host limits as concurrent downloads per host, not HTTP segment connections
Apply lower concurrency limits as existing slots finish and wake waiting transfers immediately when limits increase
Automatically request queue prerequisites and prevent circular dependency selection
Preserve existing completion actions while allowing schedules to apply transfer profiles
